title: Nursery Rhyme. LXXXIV. Proverbs.
content:
Three straws on a staff,
        Would make a baby cry and laugh.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. LXXXIV. Proverbs." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
